sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - The name of Guillaume’s wife is not known.  It is possible that she was Emma of Sicily, daughter of daughter of Roger I Count of Sicily & his first wife Judith d'Evreux [Normandie].

zh.Palerme,,Provincia di Palermo,Sicily,ITA: 義大利西西利亞巴勒莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emme de SICILE於1070年1月7日出生在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫時，她的父親Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile39歲，母親Judith d'Évreux30歲。她於大約1080年與Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1119年1月8日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SICILE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sickel
meanings: North German: nickname from Middle Low German sickel ‘kid, young goat’.
Americanized form of German   Seckel  . Compare   Van Sickel   2.

nameMeanings.name: Emme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

variants.name: Emmy
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Emme de SICILE was born on 7 January 1070, in Palermo, Sicily, Italy, her father, Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile, was 39 and her mother, Judith d'Évreux, was 30. She married Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso about 1080, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 8 January 1119, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emme de SICILE est née le 7 janvier 1070, à Palermo, Sicile, Italie, son père, Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Judith d'Évreux, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso environ 1080, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1119, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emme de SICILE am 7. Januar 1070 in Palermo, Sizilien, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile 39 und ihre Mutter Judith d'Évreux 30. Sie hat um 1080 in Europa Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1119 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emme de SICILE è nata il il 7 gennaio 1070 nel Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, sua padre, Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Judith d'Évreux, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso circa 1080, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1119, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Mileto, Calabria, Italy: イタリアカラブリアヴィボ ベレンティア

ja.Clermont-Ferrand,63113,Puy-de-Dôme,Auver: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランド
ja.Palerme,,Provincia di Palermo,Sicily,ITA: イタリアシシリアプアラーモ
ja.lifeSummary: Emme de SICILEが1070年1月7日にイタリアシシリアプアラーモで生まれた時，父Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicileは39歳，母Judith d'Évreuxは30歳であった。約1080年にヨーロッパでRodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescagliosoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1119年1月8日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emme de SICILE(이)가 1070년 1월 7일 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith d'Évreux(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 우럽에서 Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1119년 1월 8일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.7 JAN 1070–8 JAN 1119: 1070 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7–1119 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 8

pt.7 JAN 1070–8 JAN 1119: 7 de janeiro de 1070–8 de janeiro de 1119
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emme de SICILE nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1070, em Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, seu pai, Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Judith d'Évreux, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso aproximadamente 1080, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1119, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emme de SICILE родилась 7 января 1070 г. в местности пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия, её отцу по имени Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith d'Évreux, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso около 1080 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 января 1119 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.from 1115 to 1119: mai le 1115 e o'o I le 1119

es.7 JAN 1070–8 JAN 1119: 7 de enero de 1070–8 de enero de 1119
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emme de SICILE nació el 7 de enero de 1070, en Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, su papá, Roger I de Hauteville Comte de Sicile, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Judith d'Évreux, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Rodolfo Macabeo Conti de Montescaglioso aproximadamente 1080, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1119, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 49 años.
